title: Bubble Sort Array in Reverse Order

statement.markdown: Given an array of integers, implement a bubble sort algorithm to sort it in ascending order. The function should return True if the array is sorted properly, and False otherwise.
statement.inputFormat: Input will consist of an array of space-separated integers.
statement.outputFormat: The function should return a boolean value (True or False) indicating whether the array is sorted in ascending order.
statement.notes: Assume that the input array contains only positive integers.

examples.explanation: The input array is not sorted in ascending order, so the function should return False.
The input array is sorted in ascending order, so the function should return True.
